title: Assure scanner snapshot request v1
description: The materialization request of the wrapper-to-engine wire: how the snapshots are supplied. The repository handle ordinal is fixed by the published handle table so the request bytes are identical across the in-process and future subprocess lanes; pre_acquired is the networkless promise that every needed object is already in the primary object database. Its diagnostic digest domain is assure/scanner-snapshot-request/v1 over the exact bytes.

materialization.description: git-objects pairs with evaluation mode commit-pair; index pairs with evaluation mode index. Any other pairing is an invalid invocation.
